_comment: Copy to user_config.json and edit. Personal defaults; CLI flags always override these.
_comment_search: Keywords accept boolean syntax — "exact phrase", OR, NOT/-, ( ). exclude_titles heavily downranks a role when the word is in the TITLE (word-boundary). seniority_exclude does the same for seniority words (opt-in). title_miss_penalty is subtracted when a title matches NONE of your keyword queries. All downrank only — nothing is hidden.
_comment_keyed_sources: careeronestop / jooble / careerjet each need a FREE key (see .env.example). They self-skip silently when unkeyed. CareerOneStop is the best free source for non-tech / on-site jobs (nurses, teachers, trades, government) — in our tests it supplied local jobs the built-in feeds missed.
